---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, option, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature clearly. If it's a new tool, include the expected input/output shape.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Links, mockups, related issues, or any other context that helps clarify the request.
